name: Portillo's Inc.
summary: PART I Portillos Inc. (the Company") was incorporated as a Delaware corporation on June 8, 2021, for the purpose of facilitating an initial public offering ("IPO") and other related transactions in order to carry on the business of PHD Group Holdings LLC and its subsidiaries (Portillos OpCo). The Company became the sole managing member of Portillos OpCo and operates and controls all of the business and affairs of Portillo's OpCo.
